signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | MED confidence**[1]

This March figure—latest available data updated in early 2026—shows contained pressures amid Middle East energy shocks, aligning with Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook after holding rates at 2.5% (7th meeting, April 10, 2026)[1][3]. No April data or newer announcemen
